items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q1 2026 NAV surges 76% to $14.24; board approves Magnetar joint venture
items.snippet: SuRo Capital's Q1 NAV jumped to $14.24/share from $8.09, a 76% quarterly gain, as board approved externalization via Neostellar Advisors JV with Magnetar.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital plans external management shift, forms Neostellar JV with Magnetar
items.snippet: SuRo Capital announced transition to external management via Neostellar Advisors LLC, a JV with Magnetar, with Q1 NAV expected at $14.00-$14.50 per share.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q4 2025 NAV at $8.09 per share, 2026 financings could add $5-$6.50
items.snippet: SuRo Capital reported Q4 2025 NAV of $8.09/share and said 2026 portfolio company financings could add an estimated $5.00-$6.50 per share to NAV.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital commits $20M to TensorWave AI infrastructure investment
items.snippet: SuRo Capital committed $20M to Magnetar-managed SPV investing in TensorWave and generated meaningful portfolio liquidity including $0.50/share in 2025 distributions.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q3 NAV rises to $9.23 per share, declares $0.25 dividend
items.snippet: SuRo Capital posted Q3 2025 NAV of $9.23/share and declared a $0.25/share cash dividend supported by realized gains from CoreWeave.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q3 NAV seen at $9.00-$9.50, invests $5M in Hyperliquid token vehicle
items.snippet: SuRo Capital's preliminary Q3 NAV is estimated at $9.00-$9.50/share; company invested $5M in HL Digital Assets to gain exposure to HYPE token.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q2 NAV jumps 35% to $9.18, declares initial $0.25 dividend
items.snippet: SuRo Capital reported its strongest quarter since inception with Q2 NAV of $9.18/share, up 35%, driven by CoreWeave IPO and OpenAI's $40B raise.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q2 NAV seen at $9.00-$9.50, declares $0.25 initial dividend
items.snippet: SuRo Capital's preliminary Q2 2025 NAV is estimated at $9.00-$9.50/share and the board declared an initial $0.25/share dividend.

items.headline_ai: SuRo Capital Q1 2025 NAV at $6.66 as CoreWeave and OpenAI lift portfolio
items.snippet: SuRo Capital Q1 2025 NAV was $6.66/share as CoreWeave completed the largest tech IPO since 2021 and OpenAI raised $40B at a $300B valuation.

items.snippet: SuRo Capital's preliminary Q1 2025 NAV is estimated at $6.50-$7.00/share following CoreWeave's IPO and OpenAI's record $40B venture raise.
